title: BUG #17891: MAIF - Strange behavior on Grants with Groups
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE za_ifs_data.t2 (b varchar(255) NOT NULL, c date DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
CREATE VIEW zp_ifs_views.t2_view AS SELECT b, c FROM za_ifs_data.t2 WHERE c IS NOT NULL;
GRANT SELECT ON zp_ifs_views.t2_view TO gr_zp_ifs_views;
SELECT * FROM zp_ifs_views.t2_view WHERE b IS NOT NULL OR b = '';
key_bug_features: Permission denied on view selection for user sas_lect
